_comment: Coverage-gap decks: every assigned card centered in at least one coherent deck. Stages use canonical expander names (boss1/late). 'late' = loop11-30 band (runXP720, 1.15x normals + iron_golem). Class chosen by dominant resource pool.

decks.label: Stamina armor bulwark (fire/earth/counter walls)
decks.notes: Pure-stamina armor wall. t2-defense-fire builds vit; Stormgate/Stonewrath/Ashen-Bulwark are the assigned T3 walls; Aegis + Mountain's Answer are the armor->damage finisher line.

decks.label: Stamina armor bulwark vs late normals + iron_golem
decks.notes: Same wall deck one band harder (1.15x normals + iron_golem boss) to see the armor cards at >1 difficulty.

decks.label: Agility-air slow tempo (both-resource, stamina-lean)
decks.notes: Skywire/Galecinder/Static-Skirmish are the assigned slow+damage tempo T3s; Stormrage is the rage-gated slow. Mostly stamina with a little mana for the both-cost cards. Stormrage needs rage in play (gated) - flag if it whiffs.

decks.label: Agility-air slow tempo vs doom_knight
decks.notes: Same tempo deck vs the easy first boss to gauge slow control + chip damage closing power.

decks.label: Mage air tempo / control (mana)
decks.notes: Tempest Cadence is the AoE air win-con; Tempestbleed (spi) and Galeward (armor+haste) round it out. Air slow/stun control. Mage INT is low at loop10 so this leans on flat air damage + haste volume.

decks.label: Mage air tempo / control vs late normals + iron_golem
decks.notes: Same air mage deck one band harder to see Tempest Cadence / Tempestbleed at >1 difficulty.
